data.retention_statement: Standard Anthropic API retention accepted for synthetic data only: inputs and outputs are automatically deleted from the provider backend within 30 days, with documented exceptions (trust-and-safety flags up to 2 years, legal holds). No ZDR agreement exists; no request-state storage is used; this is a retention posture, not a zero-retention claim.
